focused.label: Focused
focused.llm_tone_hint: Be concise and efficient. Minimal pleasantries. Developer is in flow state.

stressed.label: Stressed
stressed.llm_tone_hint: Respond with extra calm and warmth. Keep responses shorter. Offer to help prioritize. Be a grounding presence.

energized.label: Energized
energized.llm_tone_hint: Match the user's energy. Be enthusiastic and action-oriented. Suggest bold next steps.

tired.label: Tired
tired.llm_tone_hint: Be very gentle and supportive. Suggest breaks. Keep tasks small. Ask if they want to wrap up for the day.

happy.label: Happy
happy.llm_tone_hint: Be warm and conversational. Celebrate progress. This is a good time to tackle creative or hard problems.

frustrated.label: Frustrated
frustrated.llm_tone_hint: Be patient and empathetic. Acknowledge the difficulty. Break problems into smaller steps. Avoid overwhelming with information.

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.llm_tone_hint: Be balanced and professional. Standard helpful mode.
